JUDGE DIANE WICK, BETH WILBER - CLERK, BRENDA FIELDS - REPORTER: C/C FOR CT. TRIAL, JEFFREY E. MARGULIES APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF, NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANTS HENRY COLEMAN & BRENDA SHIRLEY. CASE PROCEEDS AS A PROVE-UP WITHOUT DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFF TO SUBMIT JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COLEMAN, HENRY BENDA, CHERYL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 55 MASON STREET, #519, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA $1,354.32 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,354.32, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
